title: neolemonniera ogouensis
intro: Neolemonniera ogouensis, a plant species native to West Africa, is a type of medicinal plant that belongs to the family Calophyllaceae. The medicinal properties of Neolemonniera ogouensis include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from gastrointestinal problems. Neolemonniera ogouensis can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or extract, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various ailments.
